title: law offices of mark e. lewis & associates ransomware incident

victim.name: law offices of mark e. lewis & associates

extortion.description: At the Law Offices of Brent W. Caldwell, we help people who have been injured in accidents get the legal support they need during a difficult time. While there are many personal injury firms in California and Nevada, we take pride in being more than just a law office with strong results. We are focused on building real relationships with our clients and treating every case with the attention it deserves.
